name: Dashboard displays stats and daily quests after login
description: After logging in, the dashboard shows the user's cards due count, XP total, coins, and today's quest progress bars. Note: the dashboard shows XP and coins, NOT a streak counter — streak was intentionally removed from the UI in favour of encouraging language.

planSteps.description: Log in with valid credentials and wait for the dashboard to finish loading
If a tour or onboarding popup appears, dismiss it

Verify the dashboard shows a cards-due stat with a numeric value (such as 'memories to revisit' or a number near a book icon), and an ambient stat row showing XP and Coins values — confirming the stats section rendered correctly

Verify a 'Today's Journey' or quests panel shows at least one quest card containing a horizontal progress bar and a numeric 'current / target' label (not a plain text list), confirming the quests section rendered with visual progress indicators
